whatsnew: New dashboards: Query Store Health, Database Health, and enhanced Backup Health with checksum and restore tracking
Live Stats: Top 10 wait types by average and total wait time, with colour-coded severity gradients
Nav sidebar: colour-coded sections (Audits, Tools, Live, SQLWATCH, PM) with per-section icon tints
Check Validator: Severity badge, Thresholds, Frequency, Query preview, and filter bar across all checks
Check Validator: inline actual vs expected value after each test with green/red match indicator
DataGrid: new text-match column colour mode for string-based cell highlighting
Dashboard fixes: audit_status, iqp_configs, and io_latency queries corrected for SQL Server 2016+
